basic_details.job_title: Surguja District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Surguja District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of Surguja District. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the Surguja District Recruitment 2026 for the post of Assistant Veterinary Field Officer.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Chhattisgarh Civil Services Rules 2012.

selection_process: Merit List (90% Educational Qualification + 10% Experience) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Surguja District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: surguja.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Surguja District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Surguja District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer recruitment is 23rd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer post is a Diploma in Animal Husbandry (D.A.H.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18,420 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to this recruitment is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer post in Surguja District.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Merit List, calculated as 90% of educational qualification marks and 10% of experience marks, followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Surguja District administration in Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Surguja District, which is surguja.gov.in.
